programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Britain's busiest air ambulance teams return, bringing the hospital to the patient, from Lanchester to Ashdon, and a motorbike accident in the Peaks.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The staff at Queen's, Nottingham, are shocked as Sister Lou, one of their own, has a major bike accident. And 57-year-old Stuart's fallen off a ladder and fractured his ankle.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at The King's Head in Addlethorpe, with landlady Helen Coy and her bar manager and best buddy Emma Green pulling out all the stops to win.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to dog friendly Beck Hall in North Yorkshire, run by B&B newcomers Louise and Andy Macbeth.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to The Albaston in Torquay, owned by avid souvenir collectors Kevin and Julie Shadbolt.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to a specialist dance holiday venue, the Hotel Piccadilly, in Bournemouth, where owners Terri and Stewart Flett hope to get their guests in a spin.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day, and the owners of The King's Head, Beck Hall, The Albaston and the Hotel Piccadilly are meeting for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Dad and daughter Dennis and Holly kick off the competition at their boutique BandB in Norwich, where one guest isn't full of beans at breakfast.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Visit two is to Hawkhurst in Kent, where the BandBers enjoy a fer-mental afternoon on the beers at a microbrewery courtesy of hosts Harry and Sarah.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: In Oxfordshire, Dawn takes her guests on a tour around Blenheim Palace. All that walking should have everyone knackered - so why does one BandBer have a restless night?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Ollie hopes his French-styled BandB will have that je ne sais quoi to win the competition. But things get heated in the kitchen during breakfast service.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's payment day. After a battle of the boutique BandBs all week, the boutique BandBers meet up one final time to find out which boutique BandB is the best boutique BandB.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In Belfast, Jennifer's hit a wall trying to balance her budget and wish list. In County Down, can Tony and Val end their Goldilocks search and find somewhere that's just right?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In Berkshire, Phil's with Eddie the Eagle and Karen, who've seen 100 houses in 18 months. Can they get gold this time? Kirstie helps Orla and Luke fend off Basingstoke's buyers.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Penny has been a therapist, artist and teacher for over 30 years, but now wants to move to the Spanish sunshine permanently and run her business from her new home in Málaga. Laura Hamilton lines up five great options for her budget of £120,000.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retired Dawn and Les from Basingstoke want to relocate to sunny south east Cyprus, where they're looking for a townhouse or bungalow that all four generations of their family can enjoy.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retirees Liz and Tony want to escape the British winters and explore the beautiful island of Mallorca. Can Jean Johannson find them the perfect Balearic bolthole for their £190k?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: John and Karly dream of owning a holiday home on Spain's Costa Almería for all their family to enjoy. Lee Juggurnauth shows them what their £90k can buy.

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: The teams create 24 classic Battenberg cakes and 24 reinvented ones, before taking on a Shakespearian-inspired theatrical scene. Whose chance to progress is to be, or not to be?

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: The celebs hit the sofa for a new series. What do Rylan and his mum, Tom Allen, Mo Gilligan, Vicky Pattison, Denise van Outen, and many others, think of this week's TV?

programme.title: BlackBerry
programme.desc: The company behind the first smartphone, the BlackBerry, meets a catastrophic demise.

programme.title: The Beautiful Game
programme.desc: Mal is the manager of England's homeless football team, taking his players to Rome with the hope of being crowned champions of the Homeless World Cup. He brings with them a talented striker, Vinny, who could give them a real chance at winning.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies is the 'Taskmaster' in this game show that challenges the wit and wisdom of five comedians, who are all putting their reputations on the line. Alex Horne assists Davies in setting up unique and ridiculous tasks for the competitors.

programme.title: Will My Summer Holiday Be Cancelled?
programme.desc: Dispatches asks: what's happening with our summer holidays since the Iran War sent jet fuel prices soaring and caused thousands of flights to be cancelled? Will this mean holidays are out of the question this summer? Kate Quilton investigates.

programme.title: Vera Cruz
programme.desc: Two trigger-happy cowboy mercenaries head for Mexico during the 1866 revolution. A pair of beautiful women try to persuade them to fight for rival armies, but they eventually side with the Emperor Maximilian, tempted by the consignment of gold that they have been hired to escort. Inevitably, revolutionary fervour and double-dealing point the way to a violent confrontation.

programme.desc: A routine check on a car uncovers a case of suspected drug dealing, three men are arrested on suspicion of theft, a runaway cow causes problems, a wanted petrol thief's stealing spree comes to a grinding halt after a high-speed pursuit, and a dog is found abandoned in a ditch.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The Operational Support Unit carry out a drugs raid at a farm, a young driver thinks that he can pull a fast one by impersonating his brother, Craggy has an encounter with a polecat and Barry finds himself dealing with an irate nightclubber.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders
programme.desc: A PC pursues a suspect who speeds through residential areas before crashing into a parked car. And police pull over an argumentative driver who stinks of booze.

programme.title: Police Interceptors: Taking Down the Shoplifting Gangs
programme.desc: Detectives in Cheshire close in on a gang stealing premium items from Asda stores. Sergeant Tom is leading his team in Preston in a day of action to disrupt and arrest the most wanted shop thieves.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell
programme.desc: A trailer full of pharmaceuticals gets imbedded in a block of ice; a truckload of frozen chickens crashes into trees; Rob's promotion to lead flagger is short-lived.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: A suspect who seems able to bend people to his will manipulates Mulder into a dangerous endgame.

programme.title: Seconds From Death: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Clips reveal whether a go-kart can withstand the power of a jet engine, how a plane can land on a busy freeway, what happens when you install a 240cc dirt bike engine inside a plastic toy car, and how tough terrain on two wheels can mean ride or die.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Trucker Brian dodges high-tech solar cars and battles heavy-haulage blow-outs. Plus, Sludge transports three vintage cars, worth $270,000, to a rally in the desert.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: On a remote Yorkshire Dales track, Alpha recovery ops face one of their toughest rescue missions - a 50-ton construction machine is stranded by a severely-damaged Victorian bridge.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: On the busy A1, halfway between Newcastle and Durham, an articulated lorry has fallen down a 20-metre embankment. The Alpha Recovery crew must work out how to retrieve the truck with traffic thundering by.

programme.desc: Featuring high-profile interviews, Piers Morgan blends journalism, debates and cultural commentary in a format that is unapologetically direct. Positions itself as a fearless platform for free speech, tackling controversial topics, and more.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel's new boss and colleague both smoke. When Rachel discovers that they make business decisions without her in the smoking room, she pretends to be a serious smoker so she can be part of the discussion. Meanwhile, Ross's son and Joey audition for the same commercial, but only one of them can get the part.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Can't Flirt
programme.desc: Ross really likes the pretty pizza-delivery woman, but his flirting technique is awful. Meanwhile, a nasty surprise awaits Joey when he tells everyone about his big television appearance.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Ride Along
programme.desc: The gang persuade Phoebe's policeman boyfriend to let them ride in his police car. The friends enjoy the experience, until a gunshot rings out. Elsewhere, Rachel overhears a telephone message for Ross from his second ex-wife.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: After Gary confides in Monica that he intends to ask Phoebe to move in with him, Monica immediately breaks her promise to him and tells Phoebe, who worries that it is too early in the relationship. She persuades Chandler to talk to Gary, hoping that Chandler's fear of commitment will rub off on him, but Gary's enthusiasm overwhelms even Chandler.

programme.title: Car Pound Cops: Give Me My Car Back!
programme.desc: Following the dramatic work of recovery crews as they trace, track and tow vehicles driven illegally on Britain's roads. With access to two recovery companies, featuring the action from the moment they are called in, to the trucks arriving on scene.

programme.title: Car Pound Cops: Give Me My Car Back!
programme.desc: Surrey Police are caught by surprise when a learner motorcyclist pulls a dangerous wheelie on the road in front of him. Upon pulling over the biker, they uncover even more violations.

programme.title: Car Pound Cops: Give Me My Car Back!
programme.desc: Following the dramatic work of recovery crews as they trace, track and tow vehicles driven illegally on Britain's roads. With access to two recovery companies, featuring the action from the moment they are called in, to the trucks arriving on scene.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Following the work of the North Yorkshire Police on the frontline of Britain's roads, where the fight against crime is fast and furious.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: The traffic cops clamp down on young drivers causing danger on north Yorkshire's roads. In the Yorkshire Dales, the traffic cops hunt down a young man believed to be drug driving and who's failed to stop in a suspected stolen car.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A prolific car thief, with a string of convictions, crashes and rolls a stolen car at over 100mph. In Harrogate, the hunt for a disqualified driver leads to a high-speed car chase.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Near York, a young driver in a stolen car is on a suspected high behind the wheel. The police must make a move before the reckless man can join a busy motorway and cause more mayhem.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team tackle a lairy drunk, a runaway knifeman, a suspected drug dealer, an overturned trailer full of cows and a ruptured gas main.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A stick of dynamite is brought into Carlisle's main police station, a gun is spotted in a city-centre bar and Duncan receives a shock when a cyclist who has been crushed and trapped under a car turns out to be someone he knows.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Cumbria's elite interceptor teams are called out to deal with a suspect gunman, a pedestrian under a car and to destroy a cannabis farm, and a Reliant Robin is bid a fiery farewell.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A serial offender gives officers the runaround, a high-speed pursuit comes to a painful finish, the occupants of a 4x4 need rescuing after overturning on treacherous ice, and the interceptors are called on a mucky mercy mission after two of their own get caught in a sticky situation.

programme.title: The Surgeon
programme.desc: Following the work of consultant breast surgeon Sascha Dua as she runs a busy clinic offering breast cosmetic work and cancer treatment while juggling parenthood as a single mum.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Paramedics help care home manager Kirsty, who fell on her arm. The team try to stabilise 67-year-old Bridget, whose heart is beating twice as fast as it should be.

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: Incidents featured include an abusive patient refusing to leave the department, a heroin overdose, an agonising toothache and a supermarket guard who's been attacked while doing his duty.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent?
programme.desc: When a Marine Corps veteran gets drawn into a domestic shoot out in El Paso, a 16-year-old boy is shot dead. Was the vet overzealous or acting in self-defence?

programme.title: My Lover My Killer
programme.desc: Kasey Anderson's kind nature is twisted and exploited by Natalie Bennett, whose bitterness and control lead to his murder.

programme.title: Skin A&E
programme.desc: Following work at a specialist clinic where four top dermatologists treat a range of conditions. They squeeze, drain or pop cysts, lipomas and anything else that's getting under their patients' skin.

programme.title: Babies 24/7: The Maternity Ward
programme.desc: The reality of childbirth is laid bare when following expectant parents hoping for the perfect birth at The Royal Preston Hospital's award-winning Maternity Unit, where nearly 4500 babies are born every year.

programme.title: Babies 24/7: The Maternity Ward

programme.desc: Chandler becomes anxious when he thinks Monica wants more from their relationship, and Ross moves into his new apartment and fails to impress his new neighbours. programme.title: Reel History of Britain
programme.desc: Melvyn Bragg is at Osterley Park in Middlesex, the site of the first Home Guard training school. Melvyn looks back to the Second World War and a time when millions of ordinary men were prepared to die for their country as Home Guard recruits. Plus, the creator of `Dad's Army', Jimmy Perry, tells us why he signed up to the Home Guard and Ken Chambers shares his own extraordinary stories from his own experience.

programme.title: Timeshift
programme.sub-title: The Golden Age of Coach Travel
programme.desc: Documentary which takes a glorious journey back to the 1950s, when the coach was king and helped give people a taste of freedom.

programme.title: BBC Proms
programme.sub-title: 2024:John Wilson's American Greats at the Proms
programme.desc: A glittering programme including Gershwin's Rhapsody in Blue, which celebrates its centenary this year, plus Barber's Adagio for Strings, recorded live from the Royal Albert Hall with the all-star Sinfonia of London. This concert of scintillating American classics is conducted by audience favourite John Wilson and also includes Copland's ballet Billy the Kid suite and John Adams's Harmonielehre. Georgia Mann presents.

programme.title: The Magic of Dance
programme.sub-title: Out in the Limelight, Home in the Rain

programme.title: Peaky Blinders: Rambert's The Redemption of Thomas Shelby
programme.desc: Rambert's thrilling stage adaptation The Redemption of Thomas Shelby, written by Peaky Blinders creator Steven Knight, with direction and choreography by Rambert's artistic director Benoit Swan Pouffer. Opening in the trenches of Flanders, a personal story unfolds in postwar industrial Birmingham as the Shelby family navigate the decisions that determine their fate, and Tommy is intoxicated by mysterious newcomer Grace.

programme.title: Reputations
programme.desc: The series of historical biographies presents a profile of actor John Wayne. His on-screen bravery and his battle with the cancer that eventually killed him contributed to a heroic public image. But Wayne shirked his country's call to arms in World War Two, endorsed the Hollywood blacklist, fervently supported the war in Vietnam and criticised the civil rights movement.

programme.title: Prayer and Reflection
programme.sub-title: St John's Wood United Synagogue, London
programme.desc: Senior Rabbi Ivan Binstock welcomes us to an Orthodox Jewish morning prayer service, also known as Shacharit, at St John's Wood United Synagogue in north London.

programme.title: Spirit Untamed
programme.desc: Lucky Prescott befriends a wild mustang named Spirit who shares her rebellious spirit. When a heartless wrangler plans to capture Spirit and his herd, Lucky and her new friends embark on a quest to rescue the horse that forever changed her life.

programme.title: Zog and the Flying Doctors
programme.desc: Zog and Gadabout try to rescue Princess Pearl, who has been locked up in her father's castle. Based on the book by Julia Donaldson and Axel Scheffler.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Guiding the teams around an antiques centre in the Herefordshire town of Leominster are Kate Bliss and Philip Serrell. Meanwhile, Eric Knowles learns about the vibrant heritage of one of the town's oldest timber buildings.

programme.title: BBC Weekend News
programme.desc: National and international news, followed by weather.

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: Detailed weather forecast.

programme.title: Songs of Praise

programme.title: Points of View
programme.desc: Viewers have their say on BBC television programmes.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Although originally from the UK, today's couple have been living in Canada since the 1980s. Now back home, and with Ginny Buckley's help, they are raring to find a new way of life and a new house in Dorset. Ginny also visits a farm helping to keep the elderly and retired gents fit in mind, body and soul.

programme.title: The Americas
programme.desc: The Gulf Coast, where swamps and wetlands shelter black bears and alligators; manatees gather in freshwater springs, burrowing owls look for love in the suburbs and a rare ocelot raises her kittens in Texas' thornscrub.

programme.title: The Americas
programme.desc: The Andes, Earth's longest mountain range; baby bears make treacherous descents, rare hummingbirds compete for mates, frogs freeze and revive, and lizards battle for territory -- all in a land of extremes, from glaciers to deserts.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Shrek is just starting to settle down in his beloved swamp with his wife Fiona, but their mucky bliss doesn't last for long as word arrives that the ogre's froggy father-in-law is about to croak. The very last thing Shrek wants is to become King, but with no other heir in sight, it looks like the grumpy green one is destined never to live quietly in the swamp again. A glimmer of hope appears in the form of heir Artie.

programme.title: BBC Weekend News
programme.desc: National and international news, followed by weather.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: News, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: BBC Weather
programme.desc: The latest weather forecast.

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.sub-title: Wonders of the Isle of Wight
programme.desc: Joe Crowley, Margherita Taylor and Adam Henson explore a side of the Isle of Wight few visitors ever see. Beyond the beaches and bustling holiday towns, the island's rare geology and southerly location have shaped a landscape rich in surprises, from unusual marine life and distinctive habitats to crops more often associated with warmer climates.

programme.title: Tiger Island
programme.desc: In Nepal, a team of film-makers and big cat experts begin an expedition following two tiger mothers and their cubs, on an extraordinary island full of potential dangers.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A special edition of the roadshow celebrating the history of sport, featuring famous faces, moving stories and iconic items from some of the programme's most memorable sporting moments.

programme.title: Death Valley
programme.desc: John and Janie arrive at a New Age commune to investigate the murder of its founder. Janie hopes for a swift resolution, as one member is an unwelcome, familiar face from her past.

programme.title: BBC Weekend News
programme.desc: National and international news, followed by weather.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: News, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: Kevin Bridges: In Search of the Beautiful Game
programme.desc: Kevin Bridges embarks on a journey to see if the beautiful game still exists. He meets Brazil football icon Cafu, Scottish legend John McGinn, São Paulo ultras, US football fans and many others.

programme.title: The Damned United
programme.desc: The story of Brian Clough's 44 day stint as manager of Leeds United Football Club. England, in 1974. When Don Revie quits Leeds to become the England boss, the outspoken Brian Clough takes charge. Determined to impose his own style upon Revie's tough tackling team, Clough soon alienates his players and the board. Based on the book by David Pearce.

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: Detailed weather forecast.

programme.title: Joins BBC News
programme.desc: BBC One joins the BBC's rolling news channel for a night of news.

programme.title: On The Front Line
programme.sub-title: The Train Police: Tracking the Sex Offenders
programme.desc: Reports of sexual assault and harassment on trains and at stations are on the rise, but victims say CCTV cameras are often broken or of such poor quality that their attackers can't be identified. We follow British Transport Police officers and staff as they race against time to gather the crucial evidence they need to bring offenders to justice.

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Join Gethin Jones, Helen Skelton, Michelle Ackerley and the team for conversation, advice and tips to make your day that little bit easier.

programme.title: Doorbell Detectives
programme.desc: Matt Allwright hears from a couple whose shop was robbed not once but twice, taking half-a-million pounds' worth of goods in minutes.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A driving instructor and his wife are determined to transform a Derby bungalow, Jacqui wants to solve the mystery of a house in Corby, and in north Wales, Dion seeks enlightenment.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: It's twins versus best friends in a shopping showdown at one of Britain's biggest antiques fairs. One team gets in a spin over a toy, and the other has an appointment with a president!

programme.title: BBC News at One
programme.desc: The latest national and international news, followed by weather.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: News, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: BBC News at One
programme.desc: The latest national and international news, followed by weather.

programme.title: Policing Paradise
programme.desc: A vulnerable elderly man sparks an island-wide search for answers, a roadside stop uncovers a lethal switchblade, and airport officers track suspicious luggage.

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Actor Mark Benton joins Robson on a Scottish road trip to East Lothian. Robson introduces Mark to bird watching, cookery and highland games. The pair stay in a double decker bus.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: An air ambulance pilot with a taste for adventure is searching for a peaceful Northern Ireland home where she can truly switch off after high-flying shifts. Originally from New Zealand, Agnieszka has lived an extraordinary life, including time spent in Antarctica, and now has £200,000 to find a place of her own within an hour of Belfast airport. Helping with the search is Briony May Williams, who also squeezes in a spirited Irish dancing lesson on the scenic shores of Lough Neagh.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Chris Hull and Lee Burkhill travel to Coventry to help mother-and-daughter nurses Barbara and Tate transform their completely empty garden into an exotic jungle retreat.

programme.title: Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Family of four Angela, Lianne, Rachel and Nichola take on the Bridge of Lies. One by one, they must cross the Bridge, stepping on the truths and avoiding the lies.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: A twist on the classic quiz show formula, contestants search through the depths of their knowledge in an attempt to score as few points as possible.

programme.title: BBC News at Six
programme.desc: The latest national and international news, followed by weather.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: News, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Alex Jones and Roman Kemp bring you the stories that matter from across the country.

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: George spars in the boxing gym, but things take a turn. Ian struggles with recent events. And Denise is urged to start treatment.

programme.title: Panorama
programme.desc: Current affairs programme, featuring interviews and investigative reports on all aspects of life in Britain.

programme.title: Scam Interceptors
programme.sub-title: He Doesn't Believe We're from the BBC
programme.desc: The team encounter a group of scammers claiming to be phone giants BT. Using the cover of uploading new security software to your system, they try to gain access to your computer and then your bank account. And they have got one couple in Yorkshire on the hook. The team have their work cut out to locate the couple and convince them who to believe.

programme.title: Gareth Southgate: Changing the Game for Young Men
programme.desc: In this film, former England men's football manager Gareth Southgate gets to grips with the crisis he feels boys and young men are facing. After a decade working with the country's brightest footballing talent, he is now turning his attention to a whole generation of boys struggling with school, work, identity and hope. Travelling across the UK, he has honest conversations with young men about how they are feeling and what is really going on in their lives.

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: The latest national and international news, with reports from BBC correspondents worldwide.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: News, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: Have I Got News for You
programme.desc: David Tennant hosts, with guest panellists politician and journalist Michael Gove and comedian Chloe Petts joining team captains Ian Hislop and Paul Merton as they delve into the news.

programme.title: Reported Missing
programme.desc: Police fears grow for Xiaoqiang, a missing nineteen-year-old student who may be at risk of extortion, and twenty-year-old Daniel, who has failed to return from a mountain hike before nightfall.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Strictly professional dancer Amy Dowden has some family mysteries to solve. Amy knows that her dad's father, Frank Dowden, was adopted but knows nothing about the family beyond that. She would love to get some answers for her dad. On her mum's side there's a rumour of a murder, but Amy doesn't have any details - was her ancestor the victim or the perpetrator? Amy starts in west Wales to investigate the murder rumour.

programme.desc: Police fears grow for Xiaoqiang, a missing nineteen-year-old student who may be at risk of extortion, and twenty-year-old Daniel, who has failed to return from a mountain hike before nightfall.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Strictly professional dancer Amy Dowden has some family mysteries to solve. Amy knows that her dad's father, Frank Dowden, was adopted but knows nothing about the family beyond that. She would love to get some answers for her dad. On her mum's side there's a rumour of a murder, but Amy doesn't have any details - was her ancestor the victim or the perpetrator? Amy starts in west Wales to investigate the murder rumour.

programme.title: Escape to the Country

Now back home, and with Ginny Buckley's help, they are raring to find a new way of life and a new house in Dorset. Ginny also visits a farm helping to keep the elderly and retired gents fit in mind, body and soul.

programme.title: The Americas
programme.desc: The Gulf Coast, where swamps and wetlands shelter black bears and alligators; manatees gather in freshwater springs, burrowing owls look for love in the suburbs and a rare ocelot raises her kittens in Texas' thornscrub.

programme.title: The Americas
programme.desc: The Andes, Earth's longest mountain range; baby bears make treacherous descents, rare hummingbirds compete for mates, frogs freeze and revive, and lizards battle for territory -- all in a land of extremes, from glaciers to deserts.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Shrek is just starting to settle down in his beloved swamp with his wife Fiona, but their mucky bliss doesn't last for long as word arrives that the ogre's froggy father-in-law is about to croak. The very last thing Shrek wants is to become King, but with no other heir in sight, it looks like the grumpy green one is destined never to live quietly in the swamp again. A glimmer of hope appears in the form of heir Artie.

programme.desc: An air ambulance pilot with a taste for adventure is searching for a peaceful Northern Ireland home where she can truly switch off after high-flying shifts. Originally from New Zealand, Agnieszka has lived an extraordinary life, including time spent in Antarctica, and now has £200,000 to find a place of her own within an hour of Belfast airport. programme.title: The Americas

programme.title: The Americas
programme.desc: The Andes, Earth's longest mountain range; baby bears make treacherous descents, rare hummingbirds compete for mates, frogs freeze and revive, and lizards battle for territory -- all in a land of extremes, from glaciers to deserts.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Shrek is just starting to settle down in his beloved swamp with his wife Fiona, but their mucky bliss doesn't last for long as word arrives that the ogre's froggy father-in-law is about to croak. The very last thing Shrek wants is to become King, but with no other heir in sight, it looks like the grumpy green one is destined never to live quietly in the swamp again. A glimmer of hope appears in the form of heir Artie.

programme.desc: Cameras follow a dive support vessel into the North Sea to take a look at the hazards divers face, and veteran boatman Billy Duguid laments how a new generation of boatmen do not appear to be as committed to their jobs as those before them.

programme.desc: In this episode, Lorry driver Kenny Watson swaps his weekday job of delivering cargo for country and western singing at the weekends, and the divers on the Bibby Sapphire must rely on the dive supervisor when visibility is reduced to just a few feet.

programme.title: Daisy Maskell: Insomnia and Me
programme.desc: Daisy Maskell, the UK's youngest ever breakfast radio host, has suffered from insomnia since childhood. For as long as she can remember, she has survived on as little as a couple of hours of sleep each night and is wide awake until the early hours of the morning. With an ever-increasing workload, running on empty is starting to take its toll, so Daisy wants to uncover the roots of her insomnia and take the first steps towards treatment. She is not alone.

programme.title: Just Act Normal
programme.desc: The siblings navigate life with Feelgood whilst dodging Leo's suspicions. Jamie takes Tiana on an impromptu date, while Ms Jenkins grows worried about Tanika's home life.

programme.title: Just Act Normal
programme.desc: The siblings hire a fake Jackie to fool Ms Jenkins. Tiana juggles work, studies and family, clashing with Shanice. Feelgood tries to leave drug dealing behind.

programme.title: Sunny D
programme.desc: It is Dad's 65th birthday, and Mum has organised a surprise party. Dane's aunties and uncles are all asking the questions he doesn't want to answer, about his worklife and lovelife, while comparing his progress with that of his perfect cousin Christian. Dane's lifelong best friend Stefan and girlfriend Nicola both try to help Dane keep his cool.

programme.title: Sunny D
programme.desc: With Dane now finding himself engaged, the pressure is on for him to leave the parental home and start a new life with Nicola. Dane will need to save a fortune if he's ever going to find a habitable place to rent, yet his office life is getting worse and worse, thanks to his new boss, the ferocious, flirtatious Kerry.

programme.title: Sunny D
programme.desc: Having made Dane suffer, Nicola agrees to carry on with their engagement. Plans are made for a wedding meeting, where Dane's parents will be introduced to Jamaar, Nicola's Dad. Jamaar is a part time/failed DJ and a part time/failed Dad, who's only been back in touch with Nicola since she's found financial security.

programme.title: Sunny D
programme.desc: Dane's volatile behaviour means he's a disgrace with both his family, and with his now ex-girlfriend Nicola. His best friend Stefan attempts to pep talk him through love and life, reminding him just how funny he is, and why they're such close friends, but Dane is on a downward slide.

programme.desc: Steve Backshall swims with a caiman and meets the world's biggest parrot.

programme.title: International Friendly Football LIVE
programme.desc: Stephen Watson presents full match coverage of France v Northern Ireland in an international friendly at the Stade Pierre-Mauroy in Lille. France continue their preparations for the FIFA World Cup as Didier Deschamps fine-tunes his squad on home soil while Michael O'Neill's Northern Ireland continue building towards the upcoming Nations League campaign.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May seek petrolhead heaven in three £1,500 pound rear-wheel drive coupes and somehow find themselves entered in a terrifying French ice race. Meanwhile, Richard tries to speed up summer holiday flights by inventing the sport of airport vehicle racing, Jeremy walks with dinosaurs in the new BMW Z4, and actress Sienna Miller is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car.

programme.title: Ibiza: Secrets of the Party Island
programme.desc: Zara comes face to face with the criminal economy that keeps the drugs flowing in Ibiza.

programme.title: Ibiza: Secrets of the Party Island
programme.desc: Zara gets tantalisingly close to the top of the drugs network in Ibiza.

programme.title: High: Confessions of an Ibiza Drug Mule
programme.desc: Michaella walked into Lima airport with a suitcase full of cocaine fearing the worst but hoped all the lies she'd been told about how easy it would be, were true.

programme.title: High: Confessions of an Ibiza Drug Mule
programme.desc: Michaella explains she was faced with a dilemma: stick to her story about being forced to carry the drugs and face 15 years in jail, or come clean and break her mother's heart.

programme.title: High: Confessions of an Ibiza Drug Mule
programme.desc: Despite being sentenced to nearly seven years in a maximum security prison, Michaella was home in less than three. She reveals how she got out and how prison changed her for the better.

programme.title: Brickies
programme.desc: It's England versus Germany in the Euros and the brickies go big but suffer the next day. Apprentice Lucas shares a personal revelation, and Molly braves a driving lesson with Chay.

programme.title: Brickies
programme.desc: The brickies head to a village in Derbyshire, where a retaining wall is needed to protect a housing development from possible land slips and flooding. Multi-talented Lauren is drafted in to help give things a push, but she isn't impressed by some of the attitudes on site. Lucas experiences setbacks on and off site as he confesses that his relationship is on the rocks, and Jeorgia is happy to have her dad working alongside her.

programme.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
programme.desc: It's the year 1995, and Dave's Games is a one-stop shop for all-things video games. Self-appointed gaming legend Dave is the king of his own kingdom, but there's trouble afoot as a rival shop opens just down the road.

programme.title: This Is BBC THREE
programme.desc: BBC THREE: Refreshing TV for the digital age. Tune in daily from 7.00pm.

programme.title: Death Valley
programme.desc: Janie and John are called to investigate when a runner overdoses in an actor's trailer. On the set of an epic Welsh TV drama, the team interview the crew to solve the crime.

programme.title: Dear England
programme.desc: It's time to change the game. Gareth Southgate must face up to the years of hurt to take team and nation back to glory.

programme.title: Beechgrove Garden

programme.title: Mary Berry Cook & Share
programme.desc: Mary travels to the beautiful city of Bristol. Her connection to the city is extensive: it was here that she had her first job and where her son William studied at university, and it's currently home to her granddaughter Grace.

programme.title: Andi Oliver's Fabulous Feasts
programme.desc: Andi Oliver's in Folkestone to help local singer-songwriter Sophia Stutchberry stage a spectacular festival at the old Victorian bandstand to celebrate the town's unsung musical heritage and rich cultural diversity.

programme.title: Cat on a Hot Tin Roof
programme.desc: It is the story of a Southern family in crisis, focusing on the turbulent relationship of a wife and husband, Maggie `The Cat' and Brick Pollitt, and their interaction with Brick's family over the course of a weekend gathering at the family estate in Mississippi, ostensibly to celebrate the birthday of patriarch and tycoon `Big Daddy' Pollitt.

programme.title: An Ideal Husband
programme.desc: Adaptation of Oscar Wilde's comedy of manners about English society in the late 19th century. An MP's idyllic marriage is threatened by a blackmail plot, while his best friend - an extremely eligible bachelor - finds his independence threatened by the charms of the MP's sister.

programme.title: WA Diamond League Athletics LIVE

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson goes for a walk through some of Britain's beautiful and historic landscapes. Tony kicks off the series with a 40-mile walk through the glorious Peak District, along the Derwent Valley, where the world's industrial revolution was born. This is a journey that reveals how Britain transformed itself from a nation of farmers into the industrial powerhouse of the world.

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson hikes 45 miles through the Weald in Kent and the Downs of East Sussex to discover the area's rich and surprising Tudor heritage. At the impressively preserved Penshurst Place, author Philippa Gregory helps Tony relish the fate of the Grand Duke of Buckingham at the hands of the young Henry VIII. Tony finishes in Lewes, where he relives one of the more brutal monastic dissolutions.

programme.desc: Ginger finds a tiny, lost Bokchoydactyl and guides it to fly back to its family.

programme.title: What's in Your Plant Pot?
programme.desc: Potato farmer Luke introduces the Fact Pack to potato plants. They discover how potatoes grow underground, how new potatoes grow from seed potatoes, and how these plants become food we eat every day.

programme.title: Our Family
programme.desc: Audrey and her family visit a farm. They meet some of the animals up close, and Audrey feeds the guinea pigs with a carrot treat before enjoying cuddles with a baby goat. Then it's off for a tractor ride, where Audrey meets a horse with a moustache!

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Stanley builds a crazy-golf course by using all the town's unwanted items. Nothing will go to waste.

programme.title: The Game Catchers
programme.desc: The Game Catchers are five friends who travel through space exploring fantastic planets with one big mission: to discover, play and collect all the games in the universe.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: Five's new smoothie café is open! Can the Numberblocks get the orders right?

programme.title: Colourblocks
programme.desc: Energetic Orange arrives in Colourland. Learn about the colour orange with the Colourblocks.

programme.title: Monster Makes
programme.desc: Rebecca has a new pet plant called Stan. Murphi is very pleased to meet Stan - he loves plants and jungles. This gives him a monster idea for the first make - a terrifically tropical bug made from a reused plastic bottle. The Mini Monsters make bottle fish, and Rebecca's great aunt makes a silly plant for her pet bug. The Recycling Express brings some egg boxes to the attic - just the thing Murphi needs to make a snippy snappy egg box crocodile. The Tiny Helpers add the teeth and eyes.

programme.title: Froglets
programme.desc: After finding some pasta, the Froglets create a rock band with maracas, a drum and a saxophone.

programme.title: Get Set Galactic
programme.desc: Two teams take on three scientific challenges based on coding, seasons and gravity. Sam shows James and Ayo his new handwashing rap.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Follow Happy all the way to the paddling pool for a quick splash dash.

programme.title: Tiny Tunes
programme.sub-title: The Grand Old Duke of York
programme.desc: Lisa and the children play skittles and sign and sing 'The Grand Old Duke of York'.

programme.title: Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger the Tricarrotops explores the world of the crunchiest era, going on adventures throughout the colourful Vegesaur Valley.

programme.title: Nick Cope's Popcast
programme.desc: Nick and Norman are lost in outer space and need to get back home to Earth. They use the stars and the help of a special friend to show them the way.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Vida is used to being the vet, but when she hurts her ankle while making house calls, she becomes the patient and all of Sweetwood helps out!

programme.title: Zog
programme.desc: The doctors visit Fifi and see that she is feeling sad because her pies aren't up to her usual standard. They take her out to cheer her up - until Zog realises what she really needs.

programme.title: Rafi the Wishing Wizard
programme.desc: Rafi makes gingerbread people for the bakery but thinks they look messy next to Jake's neat ones. She wishes them to be perfect - and suddenly they spring to life! The cheeky gingerbreads dash through the café, splattering icing and riding on Deborah's back as they try to reach Gingerbread Land. With Jake's help, Rafi traps them under a cake dome. Dash reminds her that their messy look is what makes them special.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey and Mackenzie are excited to spend time with Mia and Captain. When the older kids run off to play together without them, Calypso explains that growing up can be hard.

programme.title: Nikhil and Jay
programme.sub-title: Nikhil and Jay and the Never-Done-It Day?
programme.desc: When Nana reveals she's never had a dosa, the family all try something new and have a Never-Done-It day! Will Nikhil and Jay be able to find something Jim has never done before?

programme.title: Sarah & Duck
programme.desc: Animation. Sarah and her best friend Duck embark on simple but exciting adventures, exploring the world both near and far in their own wobbly and imaginative way. Sarah's hoping for a nice quiet birthday, but is not getting her wish once her friends arrive.

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: Charlie and Marv are trying to do their Spanish homework, which sparks an interest in Lola to speak Spanish too. The boys say she is too young to speak Spanish, so Lola decides she wants to go to Spainland immediately, even though the boys say that is totally impossible. Lola and Soren Lorenson then decide to invent their own land and their own language.

programme.title: Moon and Me
programme.desc: Inside the little Toy House, Pepi Nana has her favourite jar and Mr Onion has his torch. Both come in very useful in Storyland, when everybody sets out on an adventure to rescue a little lost star.

programme.title: In the Night Garden
programme.desc: The Tombliboos are out in the garden and here comes the ball, but the Tombliboos do not want to play with the ball. They want to play with their bricks indoors. The Tombliboos build a very tall tower.

programme.title: Cbeebies Bedtime Stories
programme.sub-title: Celia Imrie - Bee: Nature's Tiny Miracle
programme.desc: A bedtime story all about the miraculous little bee and its incredible journey from flower to flower, read by Celia Imrie.

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: Bog Prom: Sitcom from Sam Campbell. Tara and Yolonda want to make a film for their favourite history teacher. Could movie magic send Miss Stanthorpe to prom with the local bog man?

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: Yooglet: Sitcom from Sam Campbell. Ewin (Lenny Rush) dreams of seeing Gurnsfield United win, if only on the big screen. Can it be done with the help of magical creature The Yooglet?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Bart take Lisa to a book fair to make up for attaching fireworks to her video. At the fair, Krusty meets his long-lost daughter, but their reconciliation doesn't go well and so Krusty does the sensible thing and turns to Homer for parenting advice.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart's new job and a dramatic roof-top protest at Krustyburger inspire Lisa to become an eco-radical, especially when she sees how cute one of the protestors is. She then sets up camp up Springfield's oldest redwood tree, which a rich Texan wants to cut down, but the tree is struck by lightning.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When trying to deal with a rogue badger, Homer discovers that the area code for the Simpsons' half of Springfield (the poor half) has changed. Area code and class rivalries split Springfield in two and Homer becomes mayor of New Springfield, but his reign doesn't go well. Only The Who can save the day.

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: The family transform Sarah's dad's old caravan that's tucked away in the corner of the barn into a bijou living and sleeping space for when the family band is on tour.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien revamp and repurpose hidden treasures. They find an electric organ and a vintage oil dispenser in Maggie's barns, which are brimming with junk.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug discovers a new aftershave, but Carrie hates it.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: When Carrie hires a maid, Doug feels left out and hires Spence's mum, but she's a terrible cleaner, and Arthur falls for her.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie is upset when Doug does not take an exam that could have led to a promotion, so he retaliates by becoming a bartender.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank and Marie announce they are moving into a retirement home and sell their house to Robert and Amy.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra discover that Frank and Marie are going to be thrown out of their apartment.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray discovers that Debra becomes more passionate when she argues with Marie, so he concocts a series of lies in an attempt to boost his love life.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles discovers that Daphne is dating his divorce attorney, Donny, so he hatches a plan to try and get Donny back together with Roz.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Temperamental caterers, nit-picky preparations and feuding almost foil Frasier's tasteful dinner party.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles wants his luxury apartment back but must face the tap-dancing grief counsellor who is sub-leasing and the snooty tenants who think Niles is a menace.

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Adrian Lester talks about the West End production of Cyrano de Bergerac. Fearne Cotton tells us about her Happy Place Festival. Plus: Samantha Barks, Sam C Wilson and music from Talia Mar.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer sets up `Mr X's Web Page', publishing damaging rumours about Mayor Quimby, Apu, the Police and Mr Burns, which turn out to be largely true. Things take a turn for the worse when he wins the Pulitzer Prize and ends up on a `Prisoner'-style island.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Homer ends up in the prison infirmary after visiting the prison rodeo, Marge notices the artistic talent of jailbird Jack Crowley and vouches for him at his parole hearing. However, when she gets him a job painting a mural at the school, he clashes artistically with Principal Skinner. Meanwhile, Homer sets up a chiropractor business with the help of an old dustbin, aka the Spine-O-Cylinder.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: As a result of becoming a Good Samaritan, Homer discovers that the Springfield Isotopes baseball team are planning to move to Albuquerque, so he decides to go on hunger strike, but how long will it last?

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: In an ambitious build, a man attempts to create a mini canal and lock for a narrowboat. And in Denmark, George visits a one-bed hotel housed in an old industrial crane.

programme.title: The Beautiful Game
programme.desc: Mal is the manager of England's homeless football team, taking his players to Rome with the hope of being crowned champions of the Homeless World Cup. He brings with them a talented striker, Vinny, who could give them a real chance at winning.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Includes sport and weather.

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Antonelli has dominated the season so far. But the other teams are starting to gather pace. Will a new challenger for the crown emerge on the notorious Circuit de Monaco? With Steve Jones.

programme.title: Tip Toe
programme.desc: When Clive meets Diane at work, the chance of a romance leads him to confess secrets that he's kept quiet for years. But when Clive and Leo discover the truth about Calico Road, they're thrown into open warfare.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: The celebs hit the sofa for a new series. What do Rylan and his mum, Tom Allen, Mo Gilligan, Vicky Pattison, Denise van Outen, and many others, think of this week's TV?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the week's biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Two 19-year-olds take their first steps into the dating world together. A hip-hop artist meets another musician. And can weightlifter Jack give bodybuilder Eloise a lift?

programme.title: Nomadland
programme.desc: A woman in her sixties who, after losing everything in the Great Recession, embarks on a journey through the American West, living as a van-dwelling modern-day nomad.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon travels to Ventura Harbor in Southern California to help a family-run Greek restaurant facing big problems that hasn't taken a profit for two years. Makis Mikelatos and his wife Lynn have run the restaurant, the Greek at the Harbor, for 17 years, but Makis - who works 17 hours a day, seven days a week, and rarely takes a holiday - is exhausted, and if he doesn't slow down he's in danger of collapse.

programme.desc: Joey's first major film role leads to an unexpected experience in Las Vegas. Meanwhile, Phoebe can't quite remember why she hates Ross.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The gang travel to Las Vegas, Nevada, where more than one surprise awaits them. After Ross misinterprets Rachel's actions, a war of public humiliation results.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross and Chandler bicker over which of them created a raunchy joke, Phoebe antagonises Monica and Rachel with her candour, and Joey reluctantly takes a job at Central Perk.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey gets in trouble for giving female customers free food at Central Perk, and after her father cuts her off, Rachel's sister Jill comes to town. Rachel talks Jill into asking Ross out, and later, Ross and Jill return to his apartment. As he closes the drapes, Rachel looks on from Monica and Chandler's apartment.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Can't Cry
programme.desc: Chandler admits that he hasn't cried since he was a child, Phoebe discovers that Ursula is starring in porno movies using her name, and Rachel desperately tries to stop her sister Jill from starting a relationship with Ross.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One That Could Have Been
programme.desc: Rachel tells her friends about Barry and Mindy's impending divorce and wonders what life would have been like if she had married him. This leads the others to speculate how their lives could have turned out too.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One That Could Have Been
programme.desc: In the second episode showing what could have happened to the friends had their lives taken different paths, Carol and Ross decide to have a threesome to spice up their marriage, while Rachel goes to Joey's and kisses him and then catches Barry cheating.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler gets into trouble with his homemade gift for Monica, Ross tries to teach martial arts to Rachel and Phoebe, and Joey hires a look-alike.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Dates a Student
programme.desc: When a fire damages their apartment, Rachel and Phoebe must choose between living temporarily with Joey or Monica. Meanwhile, Ross gets into trouble at work, and Chandler tries to help Joey's career.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross worries when his student girlfriend Liz goes on holiday with her wild friends. Meanwhile, Rachel is desperate to find a date for a charity ball, and Joey's fridge breaks down.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Mac and C.H.E.E.S.E.
programme.desc: Joey is excited about his audition for a major television action series about a man and his crimefighting robot, but Chandler almost ruins everything.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Meets Elizabeth's Dad
programme.desc: Ross fails to impress his girlfriend's father who proves tricky to get on with, and Phoebe makes Chandler and Monica paranoid by chronicling their every move in a supposedly fictional book she is writing.

programme.title: New Girl
programme.desc: Cece convinces Jess that Nick might consider her more than a friend, while Schmidt tries to hook up with Cece.

programme.title: New Girl
programme.desc: Jess invites Paul, a music teacher from her school that she's always had a crush on, to the gang's big Thanksgiving dinner, which naturally goes horribly awry.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With All the Resolutions
programme.desc: The friends make their New Year resolutions, and Joey tries to arrange for Chandler to kiss Monica at midnight at a New Year's Eve party.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Chandler's Work Laugh
programme.desc: Monica is annoyed when she discovers Chandler is ingratiating himself with his new boss Doug. He even has a fake laugh which he uses whenever Doug cracks a joke. Meanwhile, Rachel is obsessed with finding out the gossip between Monica and Chandler after overhearing a sexy conversation between them, and Ross astounds everyone with his new girlfriend, a blast from the past.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: At her grandmother's funeral, Phoebe is astounded to meet her biological father, Frank Sr, who she has been trying to find for years. Elsewhere, Chandler tells perfectionist Monica that she is useless at massage, and Joey's fondness for an expensive bag loses him an audition.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Everybody Finds Out
programme.desc: Chandler and Monica's relationship becomes less of a secret, and Ross must prove to his boss that he's sane in order to return to work.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Girl Who Hits Joey
programme.desc: Chandler becomes anxious when he thinks Monica wants more from their relationship, and Ross moves into his new apartment and fails to impress his new neighbours. Meanwhile, Joey is afraid to end his relationship with a diminutive woman who punches him hard every time she thinks something is fun.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe finds a police officer's badge and goes on a spree of arrests until she meets up with the owner, while Joey wonders if he is in love with Monica.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Rachel's Inadvertent Kiss
programme.desc: Rachel has an interview for her dream job at Ralph Lauren. All goes well until she inadvertently kisses the interviewer, and at the second interview she mistakenly berates him for his `sexual intentions'. Meanwhile, Monica competes to have a better relationship than Phoebe's, and Joey is arrested for stalking a sexy neighbour with whom Ross gets a date.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel's new boss and colleague both smoke. Meanwhile, Ross's son and Joey audition for the same commercial, but only one of them can get the part.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Can't Flirt

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Ride Along
programme.desc: The gang persuade Phoebe's policeman boyfriend to let them ride in his police car. The friends enjoy the experience, until a gunshot rings out. Elsewhere, Rachel overhears a telephone message for Ross from his second ex-wife.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: After Gary confides in Monica that he intends to ask Phoebe to move in with him, Monica immediately breaks her promise to him and tells Phoebe, who worries that it is too early in the relationship. programme.desc: The Walshes' Latin America road trip continues - they are now in Costa Rica, where Brad's fear of heights is tested as Barney's arranged a breathtaking way to take in the coastal views in what can only be described as a tiny roofless helicopter. With Costa Rica known for its diverse wildlife, the pair stop off to meet a quirky animal lover and then head to the capital city of San Jose, where they get their skates on as they join a local roller derby team for a match against their biggest rivals.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: A burnt out car and a blood-stained bedroom reveal the chilling murder of a community pillar. The smallest of clues could lead police to her heartless killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: Police must unravel a puzzling mystery when a beloved father and real estate executive is ambushed in his office.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: If investigators can't find the crack in their suspect's seemingly air-tight alibi, a cold-blooded killer will elude justice.

programme.title: Killer Britain With Dermot Murnaghan
programme.desc: The twisted case of Harry Jarvis, who murdered his wife and tried to conceal his crime by hiding her body under the floorboards.

programme.title: Killer Britain With Dermot Murnaghan
programme.desc: Dermot Murnaghan explores British murder stories filled with detective intrigue and chilling storylines of homicide and hate. The five murder stories are told with archived footage and key interviews from those closest to the case.

programme.title: Cops Gone Bad With Will Mellor
programme.desc: Presented by actor and presenter Will Mellor, he covers seven new criminal cases to expose murderers, fraudsters, swindlers, sexual predators and drug dealers within the police force.

programme.title: Cops Gone Bad with Will Mellor
programme.desc: An unknown blackmailer laces dog food with poison and baby food with glass, always able to stay one step ahead of police, until his true identity is revealed.

programme.title: #Dead2Me
programme.desc: Bennylyn Burke hoped for a better life when she moved from the Philippines to the UK, but she ended up the victim of a cruel predator who would take her life.

programme.title: #Dead2Me
programme.desc: #Dead2Me tells the stories of the love between two people which turns to loathing - and ends in Murder. Ours is a narrative fuelled by a tapestry of emotions. The stories are told by those who knew a killer without realising it.

programme.title: When Missing Turns to Murder
programme.desc: Natalie Hemming had been reported missing on a bank holiday Sunday after a night out. Two days later Natalie's former partner informed police that Natalie had gone away to `clear her head'. Three weeks later her body was found.

programme.title: When Missing Turns to Murder
programme.desc: Recounting the harrowing story of 11-year-old Wesley Neailey, who was befriended and then brutally raped and murdered by psychopathic 18-year-old Dominic McKilligan.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: On 19 August 1987, Michael Ryan went on a bloody rampage in the village of Hungerford. Ryan shot and killed 16 people, and his crime would change the face of Britain forever.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: Failed businessman Christopher Foster killed his wife and daughter before burning their mansion.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.sub-title: Dark Family Secrets Unearthed in the Bible Belt
programme.desc: Dark Family Secrets Unearthed in the Bible Belt: Uncover the truth as siblings confront chilling family stories and a disappearance from 1992 reveals its haunting reality.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.sub-title: The Vanishing of a Promising Wisconsin Teen
programme.desc: The Vanishing ff a Promising Wisconsin Teen: Uncover a haunting mystery as a young woman vanishes. Decades later, the truth behind Berit Beck's death still raises questions.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.sub-title: The Grisly Discovery on the Gulf Coast
programme.desc: The Grisly Discovery on the Gulf Coast: Uncover a grim mystery as investigators race to identify a victim after body parts wash ashore and justice proves hard to reach.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.sub-title: The Massacre That Ravaged a Sleepy Suburb
programme.desc: The Massacre That Ravaged a Sleepy Suburb: Unravel a small town horror as six are killed, one survivor claims no memory and a shocking trial tears an Iowa community apart.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.desc: The Shotgun Slayer Manhunt: Step into fear as Pittsburgh detectives hunt a brutal killer whose late night attacks leave the city gripped by terror.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.sub-title: The Twisted Plot To Murder A Florida Doctor
programme.desc: The Twisted Plot to Murder a Florida Doctor: Uncover a quiet community shattered when a beloved doctor is murdered and a hidden conspiracy tears the neighbourhood apart.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Elledge: When Chinese student Mengqi Ji vanished from her home in 2019, her husband Joseph told police she'd gone for a late-night walk and never came back. (S5, ep 8)

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder in the Bayou
programme.desc: In 1991 Curtis `Cochise' Smith, 29, heads out for nappies in Plaquemine, Louisiana, and vanishes. Twenty-five years later, a body surfaces in the bayou and Cochise's murder case reignites. A local with a long rap sheet becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: The Death Investigator With Barbara Butcher
programme.desc: In 2012, a tight-knit Las Vegas neighbourhood is shattered by the murder of a mother and daughter in their home. Investigators must analyse a crime scene soaked in rage to help stop a killer before they strike again.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When Sherry Leighty goes missing in 1999, her family is left wondering how a dedicated mother of three could vanish without a trace. A decade later, the cold case heats up when Sherry's sister launches a social media campaign.

programme.title: Crime in Progress
programme.desc: When officers in suburban Indiana respond to a potential kidnapping and murder scene, body cam captures every tense moment of the stand-off with the suspect. Then in rural Colorado, a chilling investigation unfolds on camera.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When Mary Scott, 23, is found murdered in her San Diego home in 1969, the case quickly loses steam with few leads; years later, Mary's daughters grow determined to find answers about the mother they barely knew, and a crime that's 50 years cold.

programme.title: Rob Rinder: The Crime I Can't Forget
Accident, Suicide, or Murder
programme.desc: Two unusual accidents that are two decades apart leave a family suspicious of a father who appears to benefit from tragedy.

programme.title: Killer in Plain Sight
programme.desc: Single mother Dana Laskowski is found dead in her home after a night of her triplets visiting their father. The crime scene suggests she knew her killer, and an unhealthy obsession.

programme.title: Killer in Plain Sight
programme.desc: Police investigate the suspicious death of two friends, shot in their own beds. Only a satanic message is left behind.

programme.title: Killer in Plain Sight
programme.desc: Bob Dorotick is found dead at the side of a road in the countryside, and tyre tracks lead from the scene, but no vehicle was involved in his murder.

programme.title: Killer in Plain Sight

programme.desc: The Goggleboxers gets stuck into a new series and more of the biggest and best TV. What do they think this time?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon heads to Pantaleone's in Denver, Colorado, where he meets the Italian restaurant's owner Pete, who is truly stuck in the past. Pete stubbornly maintains that he makes the `Best Pizza in Denver', based on a review from the 1980s.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon heads to Arvada, Colorado, where husband-and-wife owners Randy and Alexa have allowed their Old Neighborhood restaurant to fall into utter disrepair.

programme.title: Hollyoaks: Omnibus
programme.desc: Dee Dee struggles to hide her emotions as the village gathers for Diane's funeral. Beth's plan sends shockwaves through feuding families. And Mercedes has a life-altering decision to make.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister, featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety.

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It's Decision Day in Austin. The stakes have never been higher as the couples face the ultimate decision: do they stay married or walk away for good?

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It's been 18 months since a shocking Decision Day left everyone speechless. The brides and grooms reunite and reflect on their MAFS experience.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer makes it his mission to find Smithers a boyfriend and signs him up to a dating app. Meanwhile, Bart messes with the school's stage show.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: How Lisa Got Her Marge Back
programme.desc: Marge and Lisa meet a stage star when they go on a touristy trip to Capital City. Bart teams up with Maggie to pull some pranks.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Homer and Marge are lost in an icy wilderness, they must push themselves to their limits to survive.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon heads to Queens, New York, where he finds a family torn apart by the stress of running failing Greek restaurant Kati Allo. Husband and wife owners Manny and Christine are on the brink of divorce, and daughter Evelyn is caught in the middle.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon heads to Woodland Park in Colorado for the first of a two-part visit to Mangia Mangia, an Italian restaurant with an identity crisis.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon is back in Woodland Park, Colorado, for the conclusion of his attempt to help struggling Italian restaurant Mangia Mangia avoid ruin. Will harassed owner Julie ever be reconciled with her out-of-control head chef?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon's in Redondo Beach, California, to visit Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece duo Faye and Brenda.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart, Martin and the bullies are on the run for their lives when a wilderness weekend takes a chilling turn.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: You Won't Believe What This Episode Is About -- Act Three Will Shock You!
programme.desc: When Homer is erroneously blamed for leaving Santa's Little Helper locked in a hot car, footage of the incident goes viral, outraging all of Springfield and making Homer a pariah.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Bart befriends a famous kid influencer who owns an ultra-cool skate wear brand, Homer leads a rebellion of loser dads against them.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Cletus discovers that his wife Brandine has been hiding a secret love -- of learning.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The interviewer at a gifted preschool insults Maggie, then jealous Lisa leads her astray after she gets accepted.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Ziff Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: When Homer discovers Marge's old flame Artie Ziff living in the attic, a poker game ends in jail for Homer and romance for Artie.

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off
programme.desc: Australian home bakers compete in various challenges in the kitchen, with a panel of experts to decide the winners.

programme.title: The Simpsons Movie
programme.desc: The combination of Homer, his new pet pig, and a leaky silo full of excrement triggers a disaster that threatens not just Springfield but the world.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible -- Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: After the IMF are implicated in the bombing of the Kremlin, Ethan Hunt and his new team go rogue. In order to clear their organisation's name, they track down a dangerous terrorist named Kurt Hendricks. Hendricks has gained access to Russian nuclear launch codes and is planning a strike on the United States, but will the new team be able to stop the impending disaster?

programme.title: The Mark of Zorro
programme.desc: Californian aristocrat Don Diego Vega returns from Spain to find his homeland terrorised by a tyrannical governor. Casting aside his noble birth, he dons a mask to fight for justice and the people.

programme.title: Bridge of Spies: Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Steven Spielberg and stars Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance talk about making their Cold War espionage drama.

programme.title: The Andromeda Strain
programme.desc: A US research satellite carrying a deadly extraterrestrial microscopic organisms, crashes into a small town in Arizona.

programme.title: Midway
programme.desc: On June 4, 1942, the Japanese navy plans a strike against American ships in the Pacific. For the next three days, the U.S. Navy and a squad of brave fighter pilots engage the enemy in one of the most important and decisive battles of World War II.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: A fleet of ships is forced to do battle with an armada of unknown origins in order to discover and thwart their destructive goals.

programme.title: Bad Boys for Life
programme.desc: Old-school cops Mike Lowery and Marcus Burnett team up to take down the vicious leader of a Miami drug cartel. Newly created elite team AMMO of the Miami police department along with Mike and Marcus go up against the ruthless Armando Armas.

programme.title: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: Set several centuries in the future, the abandoned Alita is found in the scrapyard of Iron City by Ido, a compassionate cyber-doctor who takes the unconscious cyborg Alita to his clinic. When Alita awakens, she has no memory of who she is, nor does she have any recognition of the world she finds herself in. As Alita learns to navigate her new life and the treacherous streets of Iron City, Ido tries to shield her from her mysterious past.

programme.title: Small, Slow But Steady
programme.desc: A hearing-impaired boxer follows her dream of becoming a professional boxer but is pushed to her limit by the COVID-19 pandemic, the potential closure of her boxing gym and the ailing health of its president.
